prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7606名、8565名、7885名、8242名、7767名，整体呈波动走势，2022年位次明显后移后近三年在7767–8242区间震荡；2025 年基准位次约7767名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年117人、2022年116人、2023年114人、2024年116人、2025年121人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年 计划129人，较2025年增加8人（扩幅约6.6%），扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第54→2022年第62→2 023年第57→2024年第63→2025年第60→2026年第50名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年声誉评价中未见北京邮电大学相关负面事件；抖音 热度总排名第64位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显爆款传播；近年未见投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期平稳；信息与通信工程A+（全国 顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机 类、电子信息/通信类专业持续高热推荐，社会关注度高；广东省2026年物理类考生约456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约15,792人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；省控线近年稳定在436–445分区间，波动不大；北京邮电大学位于北京，对广东省考生属于跨省报考；该校在广东招生计划占比较小（约120余人），地域偏好因 素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7767名、2026年扩招约6.6%使位次后移、软科排名从第60升至第50增强吸引力、广东省物理类考生增加3.6%加剧竞争、优势学 科持续高热等因素，考虑排名提升和学科热度的正向吸引，适度修正后预测2026年最低位次约7975名，区间7475–8475名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7606, 8565, 7885, 8242, and 7767 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. After a significant drop in 2022, rankings oscillated between 7767 and 8242 in the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7767. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 117 in 2021, 116 in 2022, 114 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 121 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 129, an increase of 8 (about 6.6%) compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science China University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 54th in 2021, 62nd in 2022, 57th in 2023, 63rd in 2024, 60th in 2025, and 50th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. No negative incidents related to Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications were found in the 2026 reputation evaluation. The Douyin popularity ranking is 64th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no obvious viral spread. No records of admission cutoff line breaks or sharp drops in recent years, indicating stable application expectations. Disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors continue to be highly recommended with high social attention. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line has been stable in the 436–445 range in recent years. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Guangdong candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Guangdong accounts for a small proportion (about 120+), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7767, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.6% pushing rankings back, the Soft Science ranking rising from 60th to 50th enhancing attractiveness, the 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of advantageous disciplines, after moderate correction for positive attraction from ranking improvement and discipline popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 7975, with a range of 7475–8475.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 7975, range 7475–8475. Candidates in the upper-middle range (about 7500–7800) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors; those in the middle range (about 7800–8100) should target Tier 2 Communication Engineering and Electronic Information as main choices; those in the lower range (about 8100–8500) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering opportunities from the enrollment expansion.
